findings.summary: DuckDB pipeline has write path (pipeline.ts, no -readonly) and read path (DuckDB.Service, with -readonly). Tools must use separate write client for DuckDB writes.
35 plugin tools at .opencode/tool/ all follow same pattern: tool(), spawnSync python3, embedded Python scripts for file I/O.
Tool.define pattern requires: Effect.gen → return {description, parameters: Schema.Struct, execute: Effect.gen} → export * as Name.
Registry.ts is dirty from other lanes. All edits must be additive — no removal or reformatting of existing entries.
Phase 1 (DuckDB schema extension) complete. 5 new analytical tables added to schema.duckdb.ts, pipeline.ts updated to call initTablesSql().
9 background tasks are running: schema extension (done), send/read-message merges, tool-failure/feedback, wave tools, plan pipeline tools.
3 blocking findings: need AppFileSystem API docs, need DuckDB write helper, timestamp approach needs clarity
9 background execution tasks already running despite critique not being complete. Let them finish, then apply mid-course corrections before launching more.
rig-jsonl-query needs explicit design decision: must bypass DuckDB firewall by spawning duckdb CLI directly with read_json_auto
DuckDB availability check pattern: use DuckDBConfig.Service.pipe(Effect.option) and check Option.isSome before DuckDB operations
